concise_definition: Horns high post offense : Actions from a Horns set that emphasizes creating potential scoring opportunities near the basket or around the perimeter areas of the court once a high post player receives possession of the basketball.

sections.heading: What is Horns high post offense?
sections.text: Horns high post offense includes actions from aHorns setthat emphasizes creating potential scoring opportunities near the basket or around the perimeter areas of the court once a high post player receives possession of the basketball.

sections.heading: How to understand the player roles and diagrams on this page
sections.text:
In relation to any diagrams below, each of the offensive players are generally represented by the standardbasketball positionsin number format, unless otherwise noted.

In essence, 1 is thepoint guard; 2 is theshooting guard; 3 is thesmall forward; 4 is thepower forward; 5 is thecenter.

Furthermore, in terms of a brief legend for the diagrams:

- Black Dot or Small Circle:The black dot or small circle represents the basketball.

- Solid Arrow:The solid arrow indicates movement or a cut on the basketball court.

- Dotted Arrow:The dotted arrow represents a basketball pass.

- Wavy Arrow:The wavy arrow indicates dribbling.

- T-Shaped Symbol:The T-shaped symbol signifies a screen, also known as a pick.

- Double pipe symbol:The double pipe symbol denotes handoff action.

sections.heading: What is an example of Horns high post offense featuring a stagger screen?
sections.text:
Two players could set astagger screenon one side of the court whiledribble handoffaction occurs on the other side, resulting in potential scoring opportunities within Horns high post offense.

[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that demonstrates dribble handoff action and a stagger screen.]

[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that demonstrates dribble handoff action and a stagger screen.]

To begin, 1 passes the ball towards the right side high post area, which is received by 5. Afterwards, 5 dribbles toward the right side corner to execute a dribble handoff alongside 3.

Furthermore, after the handoff action happens, 5 cuts toward the basket. At the same time, 1 and 4 sprint toward the left side corner to set a stagger screen.

2 cuts toward the top via the stagger screen. From there, 5 or 2 could receive possession of the ball from 3, which could result in aclose-rangeshot or three-point shot, respectively.

sections.heading: What is an example of Horns high post offense with handoff action?
sections.text: One player at the top could receive a handoff for one particular scoring opportunity. Alternatively, a high post player could perform dribble handoff action alongside another perimeter player, which could lead to additional scoring options.

sections.heading: Part 1: High post handoff and wide pin down
sections.text:
[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that showcases a handoff option as well as a wide pin down screen.]

[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that showcases a handoff option as well as a wide pin down screen.]

To start, 5 receives the ball from 1 while located at the right side high post area. Immediately after, 1 cuts toward the ball looking to receive it again viagive and goaction.

Also, as that is happening, 2 cuts towards the leftslotarea near the three-point line via a wide pin down screen set by 4, mainly to occupy the defense on the weak side.

If 1 does gain possession of the ball again, then 1 can simplyattack the rimand score via alayupin the lane.

Conversely, if 1 is not open, then 1 can cut towards the right side corner while 3 lifts up towards the empty right sidewingarea.

Furthermore, 4 can occupy the vacant left side wing after setting the screen on the weak side.

sections.heading: Part 2: Dribble handoff
sections.text:
[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that showcases dribble handoff action.]

[Image Alt Text: An example of Horns high post offense that showcases dribble handoff action.]

Next, 5 dribbles toward the left slot area to execute dribble handoff action alongside 2.

Afterwards, 5 rolls to the basket and 2 can attack the rim as well. Alternatively, 2 could pass the ball to any of the other teammates, which could result in scoring opportunities near the basket or around perimeter areas.
